NewRelease.title: Start invoicing like a professional today
NewRelease.description: Create your free account, customize your invoices, and get paid faster with ADDINVOICES.

items.question: What is ADDINVOICES?
items.answer: ADDINVOICES is a smart invoicing software designed for freelancers, small businesses, and growing companies. It helps you create professional invoices, manage clients, track payments, and automate your billing workflow.

items.question: How does the free trial work?
items.answer: You can start a free 7-day trial with full access to all features. No credit card required. After the trial, choose between our Core ($12/month) or AI Pro ($20/month) plans.

items.question: Can I accept online payments?
items.answer: Yes! The AI Pro plan includes integrated payment processing with Stripe and PayPal, allowing your clients to pay directly from the invoice.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. ADDINVOICES uses enterprise-level encryption and follows industry security standards. Your invoices and client data are protected with the highest security measures.

items.question: Can I use ADDINVOICES on mobile?
items.answer: Yes! ADDINVOICES is available as a Progressive Web App (PWA), so you can create and manage invoices from any device, including smartphones and tablets.

items.question: What payment methods are supported?
items.answer: ADDINVOICES supports Stripe and PayPal for online payments. We are also working on additional payment gateway integrations.

FAQs.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQs.description: Have another question? Reach out—we are happy to help.

question1.question: What is ADDINVOICES?
question1.answer: ADDINVOICES is smart invoicing software for freelancers and small businesses. Create professional invoices, track payments, accept Stripe and PayPal, and use AI-assisted workflows to save time.

question2.question: Where can I try or sign up for ADDINVOICES?
question2.answer: You can join from our website or app links. We offer a free trial so you can explore features before choosing a plan.

question3.question: Does ADDINVOICES work on mobile?
question3.answer: Yes. ADDINVOICES works as a Progressive Web App (PWA), so you can create and manage invoices from your phone or tablet.

question4.question: What will I find on this blog?
question4.answer: Product updates, invoicing best practices, tips for freelancers and small teams, and news about ADDINVOICES and ADDSTRATEGIC.

question5.question: How do I get support?
question5.answer: Use the contact options on our site or in the app. We are here to help with billing, technical questions, and account issues.

question6.question: Who builds ADDINVOICES?
question6.answer: ADDINVOICES is built by ADDSTRATEGIC—focused on practical tools that help you run your business and get paid faster.
